base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_logo_c_eaten — a ui (cutscene) from 1986 castlevania. Mid-intro frame — 'C' of Castlevania is missing (ate-away by the bat), rest of logo intact. One of several frames in the logo-reveal intro sequence. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mid-intro frame — 'C' of Castlevania is missing (ate-away by the bat), rest of logo intact. One of several frames in the logo-reveal intro sequence
